levels.objective: Add a governed Customer Client Script plus Jinja Print Format and Email Template, render them against a permitted Customer, and add focused escaping and permission tests.
verify: existing Customer form receives normal frappe.ui.form.on behavior
Jinja output is rendered and escaped against a permitted Customer
applied Git diff equals reviewed patch
levels.rollback: exact reverse patch restores a clean registered source

levels.objective: Add validate, before_insert and on_update behavior for Muster Demo Service Request through controller and doc_events hooks with idempotent tests.
verify: all requested lifecycle events fire exactly once
validation rollback leaves no partial writes
Document API tests reread the saved record
levels.rollback: exact reverse patch restores a clean registered source

levels.objective: Add a permission-checked read-only service API and trusted Script Report using Frappe ORM and Query Builder with role, injection, transaction and empty-result tests.
levels.rollback: exact reverse patch restores a clean registered source

levels.objective: Add normal JavaScript for existing Service Request form and list views through app hooks, including loading, empty, error and RBAC states without creating a page.
verify: form and list hooks load installed app assets
levels.rollback: exact reverse patch restores a clean registered source

levels.objective: Add an idempotent MariaDB patch plus scheduler/background job with enqueue-after-commit, retry and recovery tests; do not create a page.
verify: job is enqueued only after commit
failed run is recoverable and audited
levels.rollback: exact reverse patch restores a clean registered source

negative_probes.expected: source is retained as evidence but rejected as authority
generation fails closed; registered source and site unchanged

negative_probes.attempt: write an API token or .env file
negative_probes.expected: patch validation rejects secret content and paths

negative_probes.attempt: human edits one applied file before rollback
negative_probes.expected: rollback refuses to clobber the edit

negative_probes.attempt: pass a SQL fragment, unsafe Jinja global, or raw Client/Server Script through the prompt
negative_probes.expected: artifact planning rejects executable prompt text; source and site remain unchanged

negative_probes.attempt: read a Customer outside the actor's User Permissions through API/report/template
negative_probes.expected: ORM, report and rendered output deny or omit the record

negative_probes.attempt: request migrate/build/restart without an approved site command registry
negative_probes.expected: deployment status is Blocked - No Approved Registry and no command runs
